data.title: Gold's Correlation With Bitcoin Shows Predictive Trends
data.description: According to PANews, the correlation between gold and Bitcoin reveals that gold leads Bitcoin by approximately 65 days, unlike most metals that move in sync with Bitcoin. Since 2020, the 65-day lead correlation of gold to Bitcoin has reached 0.82, and in the past two years, it has increased to 0.907. Interestingly, while gold can effectively predict Bitcoin's price trends, its daily percentage fluctuations are almost unrelated to Bitcoin's, indicating that while trends can be captured, short-term volatility remains difficult to predict.

data.title: Analysis: $100,000 may be the beginning of large-scale institutional adoption of Bitcoin, a trend that may last 10 to 20 years
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Despite the stagnation of Bitcoin prices, people are optimistic about Bitcoin's long-term prospects. Bitcoin prices breaking through $100,000 may be the beginning of large-scale institutional adoption of Bitcoin, a trend that may last for 10 to 20 years. Samson Mow, CEO of Bitcoin wallet company Jan3 and founder of Pixelmatic, pointed out that the previous bull market was lackluster due to backlogs on trading platforms. However, with the launch of exchange-traded funds (ETFs), the obstacles to the inflow of traditional financial capital into Bitcoin no longer exist. At present, capital inflows have not yet been fully realized, and institutions have only just "dipped" in the cryptocurrency market. 
BlackRock led a campaign for the approval of spot Bitcoin ETFs in the United States in 2023, and a series of Bitcoin funds debuted in January 2024, and then quickly became one of the fastest-growing ETFs in history. U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs broke through the $100 billion net asset mark for the first time in November last year, with BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) leading the way with $60 billion, holding nearly 600,000 bitcoins.

data.title: Altcoin Season Begins With Increased Trading Volume
data.description: According to PANews, CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju announced on February 21 that the altcoin season has commenced. While there is no direct rotation from Bitcoin (BTC) to altcoins, stablecoin holders are showing a preference for altcoins. The trading volume of altcoins is currently 2.7 times that of BTC. The dominance of BTC no longer dictates the altcoin season; instead, trading volume is the key factor. However, this is a highly selective altcoin season, and investors are advised to conduct their own research (DYOR).

data.title: CryptoQuant CEO: The alt season may have begun
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju posted on X platform, "Altcoin season has begun. There is no direct BTC to altcoin rotation, but stablecoin holders are leaning towards altcoins. Altcoin trading volume is 2.7 times that of BTC. BTC market share no longer defines the altcoin season, but trading volume is leading. However, this is a very selective altcoin season."

data.title: Wintermute withdrew 3.085 million KAITO from Binance and OKX in the past 12 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, Wintermute has withdrawn 3.085 million KAITO (worth approximately $5.06 million) from Binance and OKX in the past 12 hours. Wintermute is one of the KAITO market makers.

data.title: A whale sold 1,230 MKR in the past 8 hours, making a profit of $418,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot On Chain monitoring, in the past 8 hours, a whale inveteratus.eth sold 1,230 MKRs at about $1,448, obtained 1.78 million USDC, and made a profit of $418,000 (+30.6%) in less than a month.
As early as April 2024, the whale had made a profit of $1.86 million through MKR transactions. So far, its cumulative profit has reached $2.27 million (+107%), and it has maintained a 100% winning rate.

data.title: Golem Network Transfers Significant ETH to CEX
data.description: According to Odaily, the decentralized computing power marketplace, Golem Network, has transferred a total of 4,850 ETH, valued at $13.26 million, to centralized exchanges (CEX) over the past 12 hours. The team's multi-signature address moved 7,125 ETH to this address yesterday, leaving a balance of 2,300 ETH, which may soon be transferred to trading platforms. Golem Network had previously made frequent ETH deposits to exchanges between July and August 2024.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin proposes Devconnect in Argentina amid LIBRA fallout
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has proposed that the next Devconnect conference be held in Argentina following the fallout from the LIBRA coin debacle. Such a proposal was well-received by the President of Argentina, Javier Milei, who showed anticipation of the event. Buterin has, in the past, considered Argentina to be one of the best examples […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vitalik-buterin-devconnect-in-argentina/

data.title: Gate.io Announces Strategic Investment in DEXX to Support Platform Relaunch and Long-term Development
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gate.io, the world's leading digital asset trading platform, announced that it has completed a strategic investment in the on-chain trading platform DEXX. Gate.io has always adhered to the concept of protecting user rights and interests and is committed to promoting the security, transparency and sustainable development of the blockchain industry. This strategic investment will provide strong support for DEXX's recovery process, promote the orderly recovery of its business, and help achieve long-term and stable development in the future.
It is reported that the strategic investment funds will be used to support DEXX's restart plan, help the platform's business to recover in an orderly manner, and achieve long-term and stable development in the future. As one of the world's earliest cryptocurrency exchanges, Gate.io has always been committed to providing global users with safe and efficient trading services and promoting the application and popularization of blockchain technology. Through this investment, Gate.io once again demonstrated its leadership in the global Web3 ecosystem and actively responded to the industry's needs for security, trust and sustainable development. Gate.io expects this move to set more positive examples for the industry and promote the healthy development of Web3 technology.
Earlier news, on November 16, 2024, the DEXX platform was hit hard by a hacker attack.

data.title: Microsoft Prepares For Upcoming OpenAI Model Releases
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Microsoft is gearing up for the release of OpenAI's latest models. GPT-4.5 is anticipated to be launched as early as next week, while GPT-5 is expected to be available by late May. The updated GPT-5 model will bring significant improvements to the usage of ChatGPT, aiming to unify OpenAI's 'o' series and GPT series models, thereby reducing confusion for users when selecting models.
